violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil did not meet durability characteristics or are a limited use material. Single use plastic portion cups were found stored in containers with dried cranberries and walnuts for use as scoops. These single use items are not designed for multiple uses as scoops.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cover and blades of the portable fan in the kitchen were found dirty. Fan should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Spray bottle with pink liquid was found not labeled on shelving with other chemicals in the kitchen. Secondary containers of chemicals and cleaners should be properly labeled with contents. **Identified as sanitizer later and labeled.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
